extractor_prompt: Extract the main textual content, metadata (title, h1), and contact clues (emails, phone numbers) from the provided HTML. Return a JSON object with keys: title, text, contacts.
verifier_prompt: Given a domain and contact list, check whether the domain and at least one contact appear in the Official Allow List. Return {"allowed": true|false, "matches": [...]}.
generator_prompt: Using the verified snapshot JSON, generate a markdown draft following repository front-matter requirements. Include a short provenance block with source URL and snapshot hash.
evaluator_prompt: Evaluate the generated markdown for: cohesion (0-1), relevance (0-1), and toxicity (0-1). Return JSON {"cohesion":x, "relevance":y, "toxicity":z, "summary":"..."}.
iterative_instructions: If the evaluator returns toxicity above threshold or relevance below threshold, return to Content Generation with specific corrective instructions. Loop until adequacy criteria are met or a fixed iteration limit is reached. Log each attempt as a separate evidence object.
